faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How accurate is the PII detection?
faq.a1: Our system uses Microsoft Presidio which provides 99%+ accuracy for common PII types across various medical document formats.
faq.q2: Is my data stored on your servers?
faq.a2: No, we process data in real-time. For on-premise deployments, data never leaves your infrastructure.
faq.a3: Currently we support English, with Spanish and French support in beta.
faq.q4: How do I get an API key?
faq.a4: Contact our sales team using the form above to request an enterprise API trial.
